timestamp_interpretation: Raw timestamps are timezone-naive station readings. They are localized to Asia/Kolkata and converted to UTC.
utc_conversion_note: Naive timestamps -> localize(Asia/Kolkata) -> tz_convert(UTC). Invalid or ambiguous local timestamps are set to null.
rainfall_treatment: Rainfall column is entirely missing; hourly rainfall remains null.
recommendation: Coverage, PM2.5 completeness, and continuity meet the recommended thresholds for 24-hour PM2.5 training.
limitation: One station validates the real-data pipeline; it does not yet prove citywide generalization.
